header.name: Nathan Cheng
subtitle: Film-trained designer-engineer; Claude Code power user with engineering and AI-systems depth.

entries.title: Design and Systems Manager
entries.summary: Part-time, wide-ranging role at a family-run B2B software company (users include 3M, EPA, Eli Lilly); grew from sales and support into design, documentation, and lately engineering work.
bullets: **Migrated our Microsoft Access customer database (40,000+ mixed-convention records over 3 decades) to Next.js + Supabase**; phased the cutover to address user-facing and operational license-data tangles in stages, keeping legacy data accessible while a properly relational model grows in parallel. Vendors had quoted $25–60k for a rebuild.

**Replatformed customer support docs from WordPress to Mintlify** via a custom Firecrawl + Bun + Python migration pipeline; built to read cleanly to AI agents and serve as a content base for AEO landing pages and integration docs.

**Led information architecture + visual refinement on a company website redesign that consolidated 500+ pages into a focused core,** partnering with the VP of Sales on content strategy and an outside agency on the build.
**Proposed a redesign of our flagship workflow builder,** unifying 40+ configuration options for serial-device communication into a Windows-pattern component system with progressive disclosure.
**Reduced recurring setup questions ~30%** with a walkthrough video series that replaced 90s-era documentation.

entries.title: Designer and Developer
bullets: **Designed pitch decks for 3 pre-seed startups (Techstars),** sharpening positioning and competitive differentiation.
**Built a React/Next.js config generator for an LLM interview chatbot,** cutting setup errors for screening flows.

entries.title: Personal portfolio site
bullets: **Designed and built a personal portfolio site** with filtered views by medium and category, shareable via URL state.
**Built motion details across the site:** scroll-driven card stacking from iOS notification physics, shader-driven hero, layout-animated selection indicators.
**Consolidated content + media to MDX in repo + Cloudflare R2** (was Sanity CMS + Cloudinary): simpler stack, content edits ship with code, agents read and edit directly.

entries.title: Personal knowledge infrastructure
bullets: **Public library of 30+ agent skills (~1K weekly installs) on Vercel's registry:** modular workflows for knowledge maintenance, code review, and project shaping.
**Maintain a 5,000+ note Obsidian vault** as a context store, powering Claude Code workflows and bridging GitHub repos.

**Published `obsidian-remote-mcp`,** open-source server exposing a vault to remote AI clients with OAuth + scoped access: agents pull an outline, read a section, or update a property without dumping whole files.
**Built and operate a Synology-based personal server stack** hosting the vault, a persistent Claude Code agent, and `obsidian-remote-mcp`; Tailscale + Cloudflare Zero Trust SSO.

sections.label: Skills
bullets: **Engineering:** Javascript/TypeScript, Next.js, Tailwind, Astro, Bun, Supabase, Framer Motion, Cloudflare (Workers, R2, Zero Trust), Vercel, Docker, AI agent architecture (skills, context engineering, memory, MCP servers), Claude Code, Cursor

**UX, Design, Content:** Figma, Paper, Adobe Photoshop, Final Cut, Affinity, Interface design, Design systems, Visual design, Branding, Icons, Typography, CSS animation, Motion graphics, Accessibility (ARIA, keyboard handling)

entries.title: Venture for America Fellowship (now Ember Fellowship)
bullets: **Selected for national entrepreneurship fellowship (10% acceptance);** workshops with McKinsey, IDEO, Frog Design. Led 5-person team to Judge Pick + Crowd Favorite in 3-day sprint, designing and pitching a city exploration app.

entries.title: Web development foundations (The Odin Project) + Animations on the Web (Emil Kowalski)
Wesleyan University - B.A. in Film Studies, Minor in Integrated Design and Engineering
bullets: **3.71 GPA;** Honors, Dean's List; Frank Capra Prize for excellence in cinematic filmmaking, humor, and pathos
**Led team to first place in Bethesda-founder-led game-dev intensive:** shipped iOS demo, pitched to AFI / Warner Bros. Games / Demiurge industry jury.
